concept: Envision a game where players control a team of architectural restorers working in an ancient city where buildings have begun to phase between different historical versions of themselves. Stabilize structures by resolving architectural paradoxes and reinforcing elements that remain consistent across multiple temporal versions. Research historical records to understand each building's complete timeline and the cultural significance of its various iterations. Discover that these temporal fluctuations are actually echoes of a massive time manipulation experiment conducted in the city's forgotten past.
